items.caption: A flat, isolated icon of a ripple display on a white background. the icon is a stylized representation of a blue rectangle with a white ripple symbol in the center, suggesting the concept of digital currency or financial transactions. the ripple symbol is a well-known logo associated with the ripple cryptocurrency platform. the icon is designed in a simple, modern style with clean lines and a limited color palette, emphasizing the concept of digital technology and financial services.
